en.description: The simplest way to reach me is still email. This section also clarifies the kinds of research conversations and collaborations I am especially open to.
collaboration: Embodied AI / robotics / multimodal agent technical discussion
Projects that need research ideas translated into working systems

zh.description: 最直接的联系方式仍然是邮件。这个区域也说明我更希望在哪些方向上展开交流与合作。
collaboration: 科研实习、实验室合作与学术交流
大模型、具身智能、机器人、多模态智能体相关讨论
需要把研究想法落成系统实现的工程型合作
